wallpaper.head: Phone wallpaper
wallpaper.hint: Sets the background of your in-game phone. Language and accent color live in the main Settings menu.

mode.head: Mode
mode.hint: Play mode hides creation/editing tools so you can just play. Creator mode shows them.
mode.creator: Creator mode

danger.head: Danger zone
danger.hint: Erase all progress and start fresh. Your created characters and worlds are kept.

reset.title: Total reset
reset.body: Erase ALL progress (relationships, memories, texts, money, day) and start over at Day 1? Your created characters and worlds are kept.

toast.wallpaperTooLarge: Image too large — pick one under 1.5 MB.
